executives.name: John McGloin
executives.background: Mr. McGloin is a geologist and graduate of the Camborne School of Mines with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Jeffrey Quartermaine
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Quartermaine has more than 30 years of experience in senior financial and strategic management roles with ASX and TSX-listed resources companies. He has been central to the development of Perseus Mining into a multi-mine gold producer.
